aiChat.title: AI

empty.heading: Ask your travel buddy
empty.subheading: I'll answer using your travel data

aiChat.exampleRanking: Among people from my country, how much do I travel? Tell me my top percentile.

error.generic: Hit an unexpected snag 🥲 Give it another try — if it keeps happening, come back in a bit.
error.network: Connection looks shaky. Check your Wi-Fi/data and try sending again.
error.invalidInput: Couldn't send that one — make sure it's under 150 characters and try again.
error.upstream: AI service is having a moment 🥲 Try again in a minute or two. You can resend the same message.

rateLimited.free: You've used today's free quota (1) 🥲 Upgrade your plan to chat more — premium gives you 10/day, power gives you 30/day. Refills {{resetAt}}.
rateLimited.premium: You've used today's premium quota (10) 🥲 Upgrade your plan for 30/day. Refills {{resetAt}}.
rateLimited.power: You've used today's power quota (30) 🥲 Refills {{resetAt}}.

confirmClear.title: Clear chat
confirmClear.body: Wipe everything we've said so far?

alerts.dateInvalidBody: Dates must be in YYYY-MM-DD format and the start date can't be later than the end date.
alerts.rangeChangeConfirmBody: Photos and notes outside the new range will be deleted along with it. Continue?
alerts.partialPhotosBody: Only up to {{limit}} photos per day can be saved, so {{dropped}} weren't added.
alerts.tripDeleteBody:
Delete the {{startDate}} — {{endDate}} ({{days}} days) record?
Photos and notes from this period will be removed too.
alerts.notMyTripBody:
Remove the {{country}} {{range}} trip from your records?
Its {{count}} photos will be cleaned up too.

history.heading: Trip history
history.mergeHint: Same trip as the one above/below? Tap to merge ▸

addTrip.heading: Add trip
addTrip.step1Subtitle: Pick the country you traveled to. Search to find it faster.
addTrip.step2Title: Set the dates and add photos
addTrip.step2Subtitle: Choose the trip dates — photos taken in that range will be grouped by day.
addTrip.step3Subtitle: The note is optional. You can save without writing one.
addTrip.noteOptional: You can leave the note empty.
addTrip.photoEmptyHint: Photos are optional — add them later if you'd like.

addTripSheet.title: Add a trip
addTripSheet.subtitle: How would you like to add it?
addTripSheet.manualSub: Enter the country, dates, and a note yourself.
addTripSheet.scanSub: Read location info from photos taken since the last scan and add them automatically.

editTrip.heading: Edit {{country}}
editTrip.dateFormatHelp: Dates must be in YYYY-MM-DD format and start ≤ end.
editTrip.notePlaceholder: What you want to remember from this trip…

tripDetail.photosEmpty: No photos saved for this trip.

countryDetail.empty: No trips recorded for this country yet.

merge.title: Merge {{country}} trips
merge.subtitle: Select trips to merge
merge.confirmGapBody: There is up to a {{days}}-day gap between selected trips. Merge them into one trip anyway?

titles.heading: Title
titles.autoHint: Your rank title updates automatically as you visit more countries.
titles.noCountryHint: Stay 30+ days in one country to unlock its regular title.

filter.emptyUnlocked: You haven't earned any titles yet.

milestones.heading: Featured Milestone

activeNext.countries: Visit {{count}} countries to earn the {{title}} title
activeNext.days: Spend {{count}} days abroad to earn the {{title}} title
activeNext.completed: Top tier reached — all titles unlocked
activeNext.months: Cover {{count}} of 12 months to earn the {{title}} title
activeNext.colors: Collect {{count}} flag colors to earn the {{title}} title
activeNext.languages: Cover {{count}} UN languages to earn the {{title}} title
activeNext.hours: Reach a {{count}}-hour timezone spread to earn the {{title}} title
activeNext.needsHomeCountry: Set your home country to see progress

milestones.footnote: All milestones unlock automatically when their conditions are met. The selected milestone is shown as your featured one on the home screen.

premium_calendar.name: Calendar Drifter
premium_calendar.description: Foreign photos in every month of the year

premium_flag_palette.name: Flag Palette Master
premium_flag_palette.description: Collect every flag color across visited countries

premium_un_linguist.name: UN Linguist
premium_un_linguist.description: Visit countries that speak each UN official language

premium_earth_area.name: Earth's Share
premium_earth_area.description: Land area reach across visited countries

premium_round_the_clock.name: Round the Clock
premium_round_the_clock.description: Two countries 24+ hours apart in UTC offset

reviewSuspect.heading: Review trips
reviewSuspect.introTitle: These trips only have photos from another device
reviewSuspect.introBody: Photos sent by friends may have slipped in here. Remove anything that isn't your own trip.
reviewSuspect.primaryAcceptAll: Keep all remaining as my trips

changeHome.title: Choose a new home country
changeHome.subtitle: All existing records will be cleared and your photos will be rescanned.

dotMap.highlightPrompt: Which country's dots should be highlighted?

T4.title: Wayfarer
T4.description: Travel is starting to feel natural

T6.title: Explorer
T6.description: Unfamiliar places no longer feel scary

T8.title: Nomad
T8.description: Movement comes more naturally than settling

auth.missingClientId: EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_WEB_CLIENT_ID is required for Google Sign-In.
auth.googleSignInNotConfigured: Google Sign-In isn't configured. Check your environment variables.
auth.noIdToken: Couldn't get an ID token from Google.

trip.startAfterEnd: Start date can't be later than end date.

supabase.missingEnv: EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL / EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY aren't set. Check your .env file.

home.emptyTrips: No trips yet. Scan your photos or add one manually.
home.yearPickerEmptyBody: No trips have been recorded yet.

share.zoomHint: Pinch and drag the map to frame it
share.captureFailed: Failed to create image. Please try again.
share.notAvailableBody: Sharing is not available on this device.

scan.errorBody:
Something went wrong while loading your photos.
Please try scanning again from Settings.
scan.permissionDeniedBody:
We need access to your photos to find your trips.
Please allow photo access in Settings.
scan.addedBody:
Reviewed {{scanned}} photos
and added {{added}} new ones to your trips.
scan.limitedSuffixAdded:
We currently have access to only some photos.
Grant full access to find more trips.
scan.noNewBody:
All photos already reviewed.
No new trips were added.
scan.limitedSuffixNoNew:
Grant full photo access to find
trips you might have missed.
scan.noPhotosLimited:
No photos available to review.
Please grant full photo access.
scan.suspectFound:
Found {{count}} trip(s) that only have photos from another device.
If they were sent to you by friends, please remove them.

homeCleanup.title: Home country cleanup
homeCleanup.body:
Your home country ({{country}}) is now excluded from automatic tracking.
We cleaned up {{days}} days and {{photos}} photos that had been auto-added.

For home-country photos, you can still add specific dates manually from Menu > "Add Trip".

continent.antarcticaPioneerDescription: Footprints at the southernmost point on Earth

badges.newMultipleBody:
{{list}}

Choose one from Settings > Titles to display on your home screen.

premium_round_the_clock.title: Round the Clock
premium_round_the_clock.description: Two countries with 24h+ UTC offset gap

account.signOutSub: Signing out clears this device's local data
account.signOutConfirmBody: Signing out clears all travel records and settings stored on this device. Continue?
account.deleteConfirmBody: Your account and all travel records will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone. Continue?
account.deleteSubscriptionWarningBody: Deleting your account does NOT cancel your App Store / Play Store subscription — you will continue to be billed. Please cancel your subscription in the store first, then delete your account.
account.deleteFinalConfirmBody: This will permanently delete your account and travel records. Your subscription will keep being billed unless you cancel it directly in the store.
account.storeOpenFailed: Couldn't open the store. Please manage your subscription from your device settings.

home.changeSub: Erases all records and rescans your photos · One-time only
home.changeConfirmBody:
All your travel records will be deleted and your photos will be rescanned, just like the first time you set your home country.

This can only be done once. Continue?

trips.addManuallySub: Enter the country and dates manually
trips.scanIncrementalSub: Quickly process photos taken since the last scan
trips.scanIncrementalConfirmBody:
We'll look through photos taken since your last scan and automatically add them to your travel records based on their location data.

This may take a moment if you have many photos. Continue?
trips.scanFullSub: Re-examine your entire library and refresh records
trips.scanFullConfirmBody:
We'll re-examine your entire photo library from scratch to find any missed trips and refresh your records.

This can take longer with larger libraries. Continue?
trips.reviewSub: Trips with only other-device photos — confirm they're yours

dev.wipeSub: Wipe local DB and settings, then sign out — for testing from scratch
dev.wipeConfirmBody: All trips, badges, home country, theme, and language preferences will be deleted and you'll be signed out. The app will return to the initial install state. Continue?

subscription.promoSub: Sync travel data · more AI chats · all titles & milestones
subscription.activeFeatures: ✓ Travel sync · ✓ Higher AI limit · ✓ All titles & milestones

login.title: Let's get started
login.subtitle: Sign in to keep your records safe on this device

feature1.title: Auto record from photos
feature1.desc: We classify trips by location and time

feature2.title: One-tap map coloring
feature2.desc: Finish a trip, paint the map in one tap

home.title: Choose your home country
home.subtitle:
Your home dot is shown in a distinct color regardless of days.
Foreign countries get darker the more days you spent there.

birth.title: Tell us your date of birth
birth.subtitle:
We'd love to compare your travel stats with travelers of a similar age and gender.
That way we can show you insights like "How often do people my age travel?"

nickname.title: What should we call you?
nickname.subtitle: We'd like a nickname so we can recognize you in shared spaces with other travelers later on. You can change it anytime.

sync.title: Let's sync your trips
sync.body: We'll go through your photos and build trip records automatically.
sync.fullAccessHint: For best results, please choose "Allow full photo access".
sync.cloudOnlyNote: Only photos saved on this device can be analyzed. Photos kept only in the cloud (e.g. Google Photos) and removed from the device can't be imported.
sync.preparing: Getting ready to scan your photos...
sync.verifying: Gathering photo info from your device to analyze dates and color the map...
sync.limitedHint: Only selected photos are being analyzed. Allow full access in Settings to find more trips.
sync.permissionDeniedBody: We need photo access to build your trip records. Please allow access and try again.

feature1.title: Trips created for you
feature1.desc: Locations and dates from photos turn into trip records automatically

feature2.title: Photos stay private
feature2.desc: All analysis runs on this device — nothing is uploaded

feature3.title: Change anytime
feature3.desc: You can revoke or change permissions at any time

sync.analyzingSubtitle:
We're reading dates and getting ready to paint your map.
This only takes a moment!

analyzingStep1.title: Analyzing photo locations
analyzingStep1.desc: Reading location data from your photos and matching countries

analyzingStep2.title: Saving trip records
analyzingStep2.desc: Building visit records from the matched photos

analyzingAutoNext.prefix: Once analysis is done, you'll move to the

suspect.title: These trips need a quick check
suspect.subtitle: These trips only contain photos from another device. Remove any that aren't yours.
suspect.allClearedBody: Nothing needs review. You're ready to explore your map.

allTrips.title: Review your trips
allTrips.subtitle: We found {{count}} trips from your photos. Remove any that aren't yours.
allTrips.emptyBody: We didn't find any trips in your photos. You're ready to explore your map.

subscription.subheading: Sync your travel data (dot map) across devices, get a higher daily AI chat limit, and unlock 10+ titles and milestones.

disclaimer.trial: {{days}} days free, then converts to subscription. Cancel anytime before.

aiChat.title: AI travel chat
aiChat.desc: Ask an AI that knows your travel history. Stats and suggestions, all in chat.
aiChat.q1: Have I traveled a lot compared to people my age?
aiChat.a1: I analyzed your last 3 years — **12 countries, 48 days total**. The average for people in their 20s is about 1.2 countries a year, so you're in the **top 9%** of your age group ✈️
aiChat.a2: Your pattern is strong in Southeast Asia and Europe, but South America is empty. For someone who enjoys 7–10 day city trips, **Peru (Lima + Cusco)** is a great fit 🇵🇪

deviceSync.title: Device sync
deviceSync.desc: Your travel map stays the same across every device. Even on a new phone.
deviceSync.titleMain: Your travel log stays in sync
deviceSync.subtitle: Your dot map is restored as-is on any new phone

feature.backupSub: Your trips are saved safely in real time.
feature.syncSub: See the latest dot map on any device, anytime.
feature.restoreSub: Switch phones and your map comes back in one step.

titles.title: Unlock titles & milestones
titles.desc: Over 10 titles and milestone badges get unlocked.

mapStyle.title: Map style
mapStyle.desc: Pick from 10 dot color palettes to make the map your own.

flight.durationHintAuto: Auto-filled once both airports are selected.
flight.durationHintEstimate: Filled with the estimated duration · adjust if needed.
flight.cancelConfirmBody: The current flight state will be cleared.
